assessment.note: Names a specific missing support structure — regular senior architecture review to calibrate faster — which signals ongoing clarity friction and onboarding strain.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
